title: İK Demografik Yapı
description: Aktif çalışanların cinsiyet, yaş, eğitim, kıdem, kuşak ve lokasyon kırılımıyla demografik yapı raporu (canlı Workcube verisi).
sourceQuery: SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID AS EMPLOYEE_ID, RTRIM(LTRIM(ISNULL(e.EMPLOYEE_NAME,'')+' '+ISNULL(e.EMPLOYEE_SURNAME,''))) AS FULL_NAME, ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(d.DEPARTMENT_HEAD),''),N'Belirtilmemiş') AS DEPARTMENT_NAME, ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(pos.POSITION_NAME),''),N'Belirtilmemiş') AS POSITION_NAME, CASE det.SEX WHEN 1 THEN N'Erkek' WHEN 0 THEN N'Kadın' ELSE N'Diğer' END AS GENDER, CASE WHEN idn.BIRTH_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(YEAR,idn.BIRTH_DATE,GETDATE()) ELSE NULL END AS AGE, CASE det.LAST_SCHOOL WHEN 1 THEN N'İlkokul' WHEN 8 THEN N'Ortaokul' WHEN 2 THEN N'Lise' WHEN 9 THEN N'Meslek Lisesi' WHEN 3 THEN N'Önlisans' WHEN 4 THEN N'Lisans' WHEN 10 THEN N'Mühendislik' WHEN 11 THEN N'Fakülte' WHEN 5 THEN N'Yüksek Lisans' WHEN 6 THEN N'Doktora' ELSE N'Belirtilmemiş' END AS EDUCATION, CASE WHEN ISNULL(io.IS_KISMI_ISTIHDAM,0)=1 THEN N'Yarı Zamanlı' WHEN ISNULL(io.SURELI_IS_AKDI,0)=1 THEN N'Sözleşmeli' ELSE N'Tam Zamanlı' END AS EMPLOYMENT_TYPE, ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(d2.BRANCH_CITY),''),N'Belirtilmemiş') AS LOCATION, io.START_DATE AS HIRE_DATE, CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY,io.START_DATE,GETDATE())/365.25 AS DECIMAL(5,1)) AS TENURE_YEARS, CASE WHEN idn.BIRTH_DATE IS NULL THEN N'Belirtilmemiş' WHEN YEAR(idn.BIRTH_DATE)<=1964 THEN N'Baby Boomer' WHEN YEAR(idn.BIRTH_DATE)<=1980 THEN N'X Kuşağı' WHEN YEAR(idn.BIRTH_DATE)<=1996 THEN N'Y Kuşağı' ELSE N'Z Kuşağı' END AS GENERATION FROM (SELECT eio.EMPLOYEE_ID, eio.START_DATE, eio.BRANCH_ID, eio.DEPARTMENT_ID, eio.IS_KISMI_ISTIHDAM, eio.SURELI_IS_AKDI, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY eio.EMPLOYEE_ID ORDER BY eio.START_DATE DESC, eio.IN_OUT_ID DESC) AS RN FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND eio.START_DATE IS NOT NULL) io INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES] e WITH (NOLOCK) ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID=io.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[DEPARTMENT] d WITH (NOLOCK) ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID=io.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[BRANCH] d2 WITH (NOLOCK) ON d2.BRANCH_ID=io.BRANCH_ID OUTER APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 epos.POSITION_NAME FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] epos WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE epos.EMPLOYEE_ID=io.EMPLOYEE_ID AND epos.POSITION_STATUS=1 ORDER BY epos.IS_MASTER DESC, epos.POSITION_ID DESC) pos OUTER APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 ed.SEX, ed.LAST_SCHOOL FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ed.EMPLOYEE_ID=io.EMPLOYEE_ID ORDER BY ed.EMPLOYEE_DETAIL_ID DESC) det OUTER APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 ei.BIRTH_DATE FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IDENTY] ei WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ei.EMPLOYEE_ID=io.EMPLOYEE_ID ORDER BY ei.EMPLOYEE_IDENTY_ID DESC) idn WHERE io.RN=1

tenantBoundary.reason: Active-employee demographic data (HR org structure); no tenant scoping — access controlled via REPORT_VIEW + HR_REPORTS group gates
